options.name: Wretched (Choleric)
options.description: Made from brutal flesh — aggressive, rageful, given to violence.

options.name: Osiran (Melancholic)
options.description: Made from preserved death — contemplative, patient, scholarly.

options.name: Ulgan (Phlegmatic)
options.description: Made from spirit-touched flesh — shamanic, liminal, between worlds.

options.name: Galatea (Sanguine)
options.description: Made from beauty — graceful, charming, tragically human.

options.name: Tammuz (Supernal)
options.description: Made from clay and divine breath — solid, enduring, purposeful.

options.name: Aurum
options.description: Gold — pursuing humanity through social connection.

options.name: Cuprum
options.description: Copper — pursuing humanity through emotional experience.

options.name: Ferrum
options.description: Iron — discipline, endurance, and physical mastery.

options.name: Plumbum
options.description: Lead — studying Promethean nature and the Azothic memory.

options.name: Stannum
options.description: Tin — accepting pain and imperfection as teachers.

powers.label: Transmutations
powers.description: Distribute 4 dots among Transmutations. Your Lineage Transmutations are your primary access. Refer to Promethean: the Created for the full list.

items.name: Alchemicus
items.description: Manipulation of base elements and chemical processes.

items.name: Corporeum
items.description: Mastery and reshaping of the physical body.

items.name: Deception
items.description: Illusion and concealment of the Created's true nature.

items.name: Electrum
items.description: Command of electrical forces and lightning.

items.name: Ferrum
items.description: The strength and endurance of iron.

items.name: Sanguinem
items.description: Power over blood and the vital humors.

items.name: Saturninus
items.description: Communion with spirits of blight and decay.

items.name: Spiritus
items.description: Walking between the physical and spirit worlds.

items.name: Vitality
items.description: The generative force of life and restoration.
